ModMetaData.name: Cyberpsycho (사이버사이코)
ModMetaData.author: jjomang
ModMetaData.description:
Installing cybernetic implants raises a colonist's "cyber strain". Push it past their personal threshold and they snap into cyberpsychosis — a berserk rage with massively boosted combat stats that attacks everything in sight. Craft and dose the Cyber-Suppressant to hold the strain in check, Luciferium-style: skip your doses and the strain surges.
Inspired by Cyberpunk 2077's cyberpsychosis.
Features: - Every bionic / archotech / brain implant adds cyber strain (configurable via a ModExtension). - Per-pawn thresholds, trait and psychopath interactions. - Cyberpsychosis mental state: super-speed, doubled melee damage, ignores pain. - Cyber-Suppressant drug with a Luciferium-style dependency loop. - On-pawn strain gauge, warning alert, and mod settings for balance.
Requires Harmony.
